rename.description: Rename the DN of an existing entry

dn.description: The distinguished name of the entry to update

id.description: The ID of the attribute to compare

targetDn.description: The new distinguished name for the entry

id.description: The ID of the attribute to add

value.description: Value of the attribute to set

id.description: The ID of the attribute to add

value.description: Value of the attribute to set

id.description: The ID of the attribute to replace

value.description: Value of the attribute to replace

id.description: The ID of the attribute to remove

value.description: Value of the attribute to remove

id.description: The ID of the attribute to add

value.description: Value of the attribute to set

id.description: The ID of the attribute to add

value.description: Value of the attribute to set

id.description: The ID of the attribute to replace

value.description: Value of the attribute to replace

id.description: The ID of the attribute to remove

value.description: Value of the attribute to remove

baseDN.description: The distinguished name of the subtree to search in

searchFor.description: Directory object class to search for

customFilter.description: Custom LDAP filter. Escape these chars * ( ) \ with a backslash "\".

searchText.description: Text to search for, Use * for a wildcard

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

attributes.description: Comma-separated list of attributes to return. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

pageSize.description: Maximum number of results to request at one time. Set to 0 to disable paging.

scope.description: The set of entries at or below the BaseDN that may be considered potential matches
